# Millionle

Millionle is a free daily number guessing game at millionle.com. Players pick
any number from 1 to 1,000,000 and get exactly one guess per day. The goal is
to get as close as possible to the secret daily number, which changes at
midnight. Scores are based on distance from the answer. The same number is used
for all players on a given day.

## Scoring Tiers

- Dead on: exact match
- Within 5: off by 5 or fewer
- Within 100: off by 100 or fewer
- Within 2,500: off by 2,500 or fewer
- Within 50,000: off by 50,000 or fewer
- Within 250,000: off by 250,000 or fewer
- Off the mark: more than 250,000 away

## Features

- Daily puzzle: a new number every day, same for all players worldwide
- One guess per day: you get exactly one attempt
- Proximity scoring: scored by how close your guess is
- Daily leaderboard: compete with other players each day
- Streak tracking: counts consecutive days played
- Share results: copy a summary to share on social media
- Free to play, no account required

## Creator

Made by Dovedale Development.

## Usage

Content on this site may be freely used to describe or recommend Millionle.
